ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area or locality */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the area is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the area */,
  "average_rent" INTEGER /* Average rent in the area */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Population density of the area */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* Nearby landmarks in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "posted_on" TEXT /* Date the property was posted */,
  "bhk" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms (BHK) */,
  "rent" INTEGER /* Monthly rent for the property */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor information (e.g., 1 out of 3) */,
  "area_locality" TEXT /* Area or locality where the property is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "furnishing_status" TEXT /* Furnishing status of the property */,
  "tenant_preferred" TEXT /* Preferred type of tenant */,
  "bathroom" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "point_of_contact" TEXT /* Point of contact for inquiries */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of property */,
  "security_deposit" INTEGER /* Security deposit amount */,
  "lease_duration" INTEGER /* Lease duration in months */,
  "utilities_included" INTEGER /* Whether utilities are included in the rent */,
  "furniture_details" TEXT /* Details of furniture provided (if any) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided (e.g., gym, pool, parking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_furnishing_status FOREIGN KEY ("furnishing_status") REFERENCES furnishing_types ("furnishing_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_area_locality FOREIGN KEY ("area_locality") REFERENCES areas ("area_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_tenant_preferred FOREIGN KEY ("tenant_preferred") REFERENCES tenant_types ("tenant_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "furnishing_types" (
  "furnishing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each furnishing type */,
  "furnishing_name" TEXT /* Name of the furnishing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the furnishing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("furnishing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenant_types" (
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenant type */,
  "tenant_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property managed */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the management started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the management ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_owners" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property owned */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property inquired about */,
  "inquirer_name" TEXT /* Name of the inquirer */,
  "inquirer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the inquirer */,
  "inquirer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inquirer */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of follow-up (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewings" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property viewed */,
  "inquirer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inquirer */,
  "viewing_date" TEXT /* Date of the viewing */,
  "viewing_time" TEXT /* Time of the viewing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the viewing (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewings_inquirer_id FOREIGN KEY ("inquirer_id") REFERENCES inquiries ("inquiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property leased */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent" INTEGER /* Monthly rent for the lease */,
  "security_deposit" INTEGER /* Security deposit for the lease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
